text:
Gin is one of the four cosplayers dressed as a Survey Corps soldier in Attack on Demoncon, the tenth story of the Attack on Titan Anthology.

Appearance

Gin has dyed purple hair, tan skin and brown eyes. During the convention he wears a white shirt with the Survey Corps uniform and fake swords.

Story

During the Demoncon, Gin and his friends Jemaine, Brian and John are dressed up as Survey Corps members. They come across a group of three ladies dressed as the Colossus Titan. Gin approaches one of them, Lisa and introduces himself in a flirtatious manner but before she can introduce herself he gropes her bottom. As a result, she slaps him, which upsets him but he tries to apologize anyway.

Lisa is angry and begins to act as if she was the Colossus Titan. Gin, Brian and John then react as if they were Survey Corps soldiers and charge at her. As he tries to attack her, Gin witnesses Lisa taking down John then Brian. He then attempts to attack her one last time but is taken down as well. As a result, he lays on the floor with black eyes and a missing tooth.
